<features>
- observable feature: petal shape
- observable feature: petal color
- observable feature: petal number
</features>
<kb>

- IF [petal shape = pointed and petal color = red/white and petal number = 5] THEN [83]

- IF [petal shape = spiky and petal color = red/white/pink and petal number = many] THEN [12]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The Query Image has long petals, pink color, and 6 petals, so rule [86] fires.
</rule_check>

<response>86</response>
